rounds.title: Row 1
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in the 2nd ch from the hook and in each ch across. (113 sc) Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each chain across, starting from the second chain from the hook.

rounds.title: Row 2
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to teal in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch across, changing to teal yarn in the last stitch.

rounds.title: Row 3
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch across.

rounds.title: Row 4
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to off white in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch across, changing to off white yarn in the last stitch.

rounds.title: Row 5
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in the first 2 sc,*fpdc around the next sc from 3 rows below (see reference image), then - back on your working row - sk the sc behind the fpdc you just made, 1 sc in each of the next 2 sc;* repeat from * to * across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work fpdc pattern: sc 2, fpdc around stitch from 3 rows below, skip the stitch behind the fpdc, sc 2; repeat across.

rounds.title: Row 6
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each st across, changing to light blue in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch across, changing to light blue yarn in the last stitch.

rounds.title: Row 7
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch across.

rounds.title: Row 8
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to off white in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch across, changing to off white yarn in the last stitch.

rounds.title: Row 9
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in the first 2 sc,*fpdc around the top of the fpdc from 4 rows below, then - back on your working row - sk the sc behind the fpdc you just made, 1 sc in each of the next 2 sc;* repeat from * to * across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work fpdc pattern: sc 2, fpdc around fpdc from 4 rows below, skip the stitch behind, sc 2; repeat across.

rounds.title: Row 10
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across,changing to teal in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch across, changing to teal yarn in the last stitch.

rounds.title: Row 11
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch across.

rounds.title: Row 12
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in each sc across, changing to off white in the last sc. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch across, changing to off white yarn in the last stitch.

rounds.title: Row 13
rounds.rawInstruction: 1 sc in the first 2 sc,*fpdc around the top of the fpdc from 4 rows below, then - back on your working row - sk the sc behind the fpdc you just made, 1 sc in each of the next 2 sc;* repeat from * to * across. Ch 1, turn.
rounds.summary: Work fpdc pattern: sc 2, fpdc around fpdc from 4 rows below, skip the stitch behind, sc 2; repeat across.

rounds.title: Repeat Rows 6-13
rounds.rawInstruction: Repeat Rows 6-13 until you have a total of 118 rows.
rounds.summary: Cycle through rows 6-13 repeatedly until the blanket body reaches 118 rows total.

rounds.title: Final Row
rounds.rawInstruction: Ch 1, turn, and do one more row of sc.
rounds.summary: After completing the repeats, work one final row of single crochet.

rounds.title: Weave in ends, then move on to the border.
rounds.rawInstruction: Weave in ends, then move on to the border.
rounds.summary: Weave in all loose yarn ends before starting the border.

rounds.title: Round 1
rounds.rawInstruction: With off white, place one sc evenly around the entire blanket. Place 3 sc in each corner. *Tip: while working along the sides, place two sc for each colored row, so 2 sc per white row, 2 sc for each teal row, etc. This way you won't be adding unnecessary single crochets to the sides which could result in a wavy edge. Join with sl st to the first sc you made. Finish off white, add teal.
rounds.summary: Place single crochet evenly around the entire blanket with 3 sc in each corner; join with slip stitch, then finish off white and attach teal.

rounds.title: Round 2
rounds.rawInstruction: Ch 2, 1 hdc in each st around, placing 3 hdc in each corner. Join with a sl st to the first hdc. Finish off teal, add light blue.
rounds.summary: Work half double crochet in each stitch around with 3 hdc in each corner; join with slip stitch, then finish off teal and attach light blue.

rounds.title: Round 3
rounds.rawInstruction: Ch 1, 1 sc in each st around, place 3 sc in each corner. Join with a sl st to the first sc. Finish off. Weave in ends.
rounds.summary: Work single crochet in each stitch around with 3 sc in each corner; join, finish off, and weave in ends.

materials: Circulo's Alpaya Yarn - 3 hanks of off white, 2 hanks of teal, 2 hanks of light blue
Blocking mat or thick towel and pins
